task.tfcmaid.tfc_shears.desc: The maid will help you shear sheep and other animals.
task.tfcmaid.tfc_shears.condition.has_sh: Holding shears in the main hand.
task.tfcmaid.tfc_feather.desc: The maid will help you feather birds.
task.tfcmaid.tfc_milk.desc: The maid will help you milk animals.
task.tfcmaid.tfc_milk.condition.has_cont: Has available container in main hand or backpack.
task.tfcmaid.tfc_feed.desc: The maid will help you feed animals.
task.tfcmaid.tfc_feed.condition.has_food: Has food for animals in main hand or backpack.
task.tfcmaid.tfc_kill_old.desc: The maid will kill aged animals.
task.tfcmaid.tfc_normal_crop.desc: The maid will help you plant and harvest normal crops.
task.tfcmaid.tfc_normal_crop.condition.h: Holding a hoe in main hand.
task.tfcmaid.tfc_water_crop.desc: The maid will help you plant and harvest aquatic crops.
task.tfcmaid.tfc_water_crop.condition.ha: Holding a hoe in main hand.
task.tfcmaid.tfc_pickable_crop.desc: The maid will help you plant and harvest pickable crops.
task.tfcmaid.tfc_pickable_crop.condition: Holding a hoe in main hand.
task.tfcmaid.tfc_spreading_crop.desc: The maid will help you plant and harvest spreading crops.
task.tfcmaid.tfc_spreading_crop.conditio: Holding a hoe in main hand.
Holding an axe in off hand.
task.tfcmaid.tfc_berry_bush.desc: The maid will help you pick berries from bushes.
task.tfcmaid.tfc_javelin_attack.desc: The maid will help you throw javelins to attack nearby enemies.
task.tfcmaid.tfc_javelin_attack.conditio: Holding a javelin in the main hand.
task.tfcmaid.tfc_panning.desc: The maid will use a pan to pan for ores, need water source in working area.
task.tfcmaid.tfc_panning.condition.has_e: Holding an empty pan in the main hand.
task.tfcmaid.tfc_panning.condition.has_p: Has a pan with pannable items in inventory.
